english: Our bodies evolved to draw healing energy from the sun's red and near-infrared light - to fuel cellular function, support skin repair, and promote overall skin health. The problem is that the sun also exposes us to harmful UV and blue light, which can adversely cause skin aging, pigmentation, and DNA damage. So FAQ™ has engineered a revolutionary new device: a full-spectrum red light therapy device that mimics the full spectrum of the sun’s natural healing wavelengths - delivering both broad and narrow light wavelengths, while filtering out damaging UV and blue light. This isn’t just red light therapy. It’s the complete spectrum of skin rejuvenation.
spanish: Nuestros cuerpos han evolucionado para captar la energía reparadora de la luz roja y el infrarrojo cercano del sol, impulsando la función celular, favoreciendo la reparación de la piel y promoviendo su salud en general. El problema es que el sol también nos expone a radiaciones dañinas como los rayos UV y la luz azul, que pueden acelerar el envejecimiento cutáneo, causar pigmentación irregular y dañar el ADN. english: Red LED light therapy (633 nm) is a safe, effective, and natural treatment option for skin rejuvenation. This makes it an ideal solution for achieving smoother, youthful-looking skin. Penetrates skin more deeply than the other wavelengths and helps improve more advanced signs of aging. Used to treat everything from pigmentation and acne, to rosacea, hair loss and uneven skin tone. Red LED light therapy adds maximum power to any skin rejuvenation treatment.

Se utiliza para tratar desde la pigmentación y el acné, hasta la rosácea, la caída del cabello y el tono desigual de la piel. La fototerapia LED de luz roja aumenta al máximo la potencia de cualquier tratamiento para rejuvenecer la piel.
